name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters
description: One of India's most prominent specialty roasters, Blue Tokai sources single-origin beans directly from Indian farms — Attikan, Ratnagiri, Riverdale and more. Their roasts are precise, their traceability is excellent.

name: Coffeeverse
description: An Indian specialty roaster focused on highlighting the complexity of Indian and international origins. Known for experimental processing and thoughtful roast profiles.

name: Humble Bean
description: Humble Bean is a boutique Indian roaster with a philosophy of keeping it simple and letting great green coffee speak for itself. Clean, transparent, and always approachable.
